description: The Porsche Cayenne, produced since 2002, was the SUV that saved Porsche financially. Across three generations, it has offered everything from diesel efficiency to the 670 bhp Turbo GT. The first-generation Turbo S and current Turbo E-Hybrid are the performance highlights.
